candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line and appears to be the primary reported sales/revenue label.
Also a valid revenue line; same values as Rental revenue, useful as fallback if label changes over time.
Financial income, not operating revenue.
Associate income, not top-line revenue.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list, not a sum. Rental revenue is the most specific top-line line; Total Revenue is a fallback.
CR:c|low|missing. No clear cost of goods sold/cost of sales/direct service cost row is presented. Property-level cost lines exist, but none is clearly the comprehensive COGS concept required.

candidates.why: Could be an overhead bucket, but may also include broader operating/property costs and acts like a subtotal.
Clear administrative overhead component and best SG&A-like row.

candidates.row_label: Other revenue Operating expenses Maintenance costs Property tax Other property expenses
candidates.why: Garbled combined label; not a clean SG&A component and likely unsuitable.

variables.notes: CR:c|low|missing. Selected the clearest overhead component. Excluded Operating expenses because it appears broader/possibly subtotal-like and may include non-SG&A property operating costs. Excluded maintenance/property tax/other property expenses as direct property/service costs rather than SG&A.
No dedicated research and development expense line is present.

candidates.why: Best recurring finance-cost total; preferable here because detailed interest rows are incomplete across years and this captures the recurring financing burden.
Good interest expense component, but unavailable in 2025 preview and may not fully cover all recurring finance costs.
Duplicate-style label but appears unpopulated in preview.

candidates.why: Recurring interest component, but only a partial component of total financing costs.
Minority interest allocation, not interest expense.
Minority interest, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: of which attributable to non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Non-controlling interest allocation, not finance cost.

candidates.why: Recurring interest component, but supplemental and only partial.
Balance sheet liability, not period interest expense.
Balance sheet liability, not period interest expense.

candidates.row_label: of which equity attributable to non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Equity attribution line, not finance cost.

variables.notes: Chose the single recurring finance-cost total to avoid double counting with underlying components. Detailed components exist for some years but appear incomplete, while Financial expenses is populated across years.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Income statement line, not balance sheet equity.
Could represent total equity, but preview is blank and would include NCI if used.
There are duplicate Equity rows; one appears to be parent equity and another total equity, creating ambiguity.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity

Total balance sheet size, not equity.

variables.notes: R:nc. Manual review required because the Balance Sheet contains duplicate row labels 'Equity'. Based on ordering, the first 'Equity' appears to be equity excluding non-controlling interests (it is followed by 'of which equity attributable to non-controlling interests' and then another Equity total), but the duplicate label makes the exact mapping ambiguous.

Income statement minority interest allocation, not balance sheet minority equity.
